tasks.subject: ③-T1: Server — redesign CodeScene record + rollup (verdict/pp)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** internal/stats/codescene.go reads the verdict/pp record and aggregates the new codescene rollup block; codescene key omitted when no records. Repo anti-tangent-mcp, branch version/0.11.0.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/stats/codescene.go", "internal/stats/codescene_test.go", "CHANGELOG.md"], "verifyCommand": "go test -race ./internal/stats/...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["CodesceneEvent verdict/pp fields no Score*", "CodesceneRollup gate/pp fields no score", "computeCodescene aggregates + nil on empty", "CHANGELOG 0.11.0"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: ③-T2: CodeScene logging hook (script + test)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** fire-and-forget bash+jq PostToolUse hook appends one T1-shaped record per analyze_change_set run to codescene-events.jsonl; no paths/code/functions. STEP 0: pin tool_response shape empirically first.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["examples/hooks/codescene-log.sh", "examples/hooks/codescene-log_test.sh", "examples/hooks/testdata/analyze_change_set.stdin.json"], "verifyCommand": "examples/hooks/codescene-log_test.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["record fields match CodesceneEvent", "no path/fn leak", "silent skip on unset dir/empty results", "trend = sign(net_pp)"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: ③-T3: Contract doc + wire hook into settings
tasks.description:
**Goal:** codescene-stats.md documents the new record/rollup + install; hook registered in ~/.claude/settings.json (additive PostToolUse entry, valid JSON, existing *-matcher preserved).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/team-setup/codescene-stats.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -c score_before docs/team-setup/codescene-stats.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["doc verdict/pp record+rollup+install", "no score_before", "settings.json scoped entry alongside existing"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
